steps.voice: Data Logging and Peak Hold — session capture tools.
Tap Start Logging with an SD card in — every signal written as CSV.
Rate dropdown — 1 hertz for long drives up to 200 for dyno work.
Peak Hold tracks every signal's all-time max and min. View Peaks opens the table.
Current in teal, min in green, max in amber. Scrollable.
Reset All wipes min and max before a fresh session.
Back here, Reset Peaks does the same without opening the table.
